response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked phonetics and verified that vocals perfectly match the song lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Leveraged the reference lyrics for transcription and added on-screen text translations for the intro.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual title cards at the beginning, handled continuous rapid vocals with aggressive truncation, and precisely synchronized the countdown chants.

subtitles.original: 新衣装お披露目＆超告知あり!?
subtitles.english: [New Outfit Reveal & Super Announcement!?]

subtitles.original: 痛くて目を塞いでも聞こえちゃう不安ショー
subtitles.english: Even if I cover my eyes because it hurts, I still hear this uneasy show

subtitles.original: 悩んでも変わらないからなんだかんだやるしかないか
subtitles.english: Worrying won't change anything, so in the end, I just have to do it

subtitles.original: 壊れるならいっそ直しやすいように
subtitles.english: If it's going to break, I'd rather it be easy to fix

subtitles.original: どんな形目指せるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder what kind of shape I can aim for

subtitles.original: 助走なしのジャンプ 紐なしでダイブ
subtitles.english: A jump with no running start, a dive with no safety line

subtitles.original: 今日のあたし褒めてあげたいじゃんか
subtitles.english: I want to praise myself for today, don't I?

subtitles.original: 息したい もっと響きたい
subtitles.english: I want to breathe, I want to resonate more

subtitles.original: ねえあたし以上が見れるかも 妄想止まんないや
subtitles.english: Hey, maybe I can see beyond myself, my delusions won't stop

subtitles.original: ファッションビート嗅いでみちゃう？
subtitles.english: Want to get a taste of the Fashion Beat?

subtitles.original: 夢にアッソなんて吐けやしないな
subtitles.english: I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams

subtitles.original: 叶えるのはあたし自身か それとも誰かにお任せか
subtitles.english: Will I be the one to make it come true, or will I leave it to someone else?

subtitles.original: ただただ自分に勝ちたい
subtitles.english: I just want to win against myself

subtitles.original: ニューファッションビート愛を喰らう
subtitles.english: New Fashion Beat, consuming love

subtitles.original: 負けるなんてごめんだ 味がしないな
subtitles.english: I refuse to lose, it leaves a tasteless feeling

subtitles.original: 何度でも灰になる進化 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: Evolving and turning to ashes time and again, the personification of a reborn bug

subtitles.original: まだまだ腐ってあげない そう、ない
subtitles.english: I won't let myself rot just yet, no, not yet

subtitles.original: チクチク刺してくるのは飽き飽きしてるわ
subtitles.english: I'm sick and tired of the constant pricking

subtitles.original: ごめん鬱雑い言葉遊びはどうかちゃんと仕舞っておいて
subtitles.english: Sorry, but please keep those annoying wordplays tucked away

subtitles.original: あたしこそがライバル 当たり前の解釈
subtitles.english: I am my own rival, that's only natural

subtitles.original: どうしたらいい わかってるのに
subtitles.english: Even though I already know what I need to do

subtitles.original: 助走なしのジャンプ 紐なしでダイブ
subtitles.english: A jump with no running start, a dive with no safety line

subtitles.original: 今日のあたし出来る気しないなって<
subtitles.english: Thinking 'I don't feel like I can do it today'

subtitles.original: 気にしないなんて無理じゃない？
subtitles.english: But isn't it impossible not to care?

subtitles.original: ねえあたし以外と比べてもクソつまんないじゃんか
subtitles.english: Hey, comparing me to anyone else is just super boring, isn't it?

subtitles.original: うぜーー
subtitles.english: So annoying!

subtitles.original: ファッションビート嗅いでみちゃう？
subtitles.english: Want to get a taste of the Fashion Beat?

subtitles.original: 夢にアッソなんて吐けやしないな
subtitles.english: I can't just say 'whatever' to my dreams

subtitles.original: 叶えるのはあたし自身か それとも誰かにお任せか
subtitles.english: Will I be the one to make it come true, or will I leave it to someone else?

subtitles.original: ただただ自分に勝ちたい
subtitles.english: I just want to win against myself

subtitles.original: ニューファッションビート愛を喰らう
subtitles.english: New Fashion Beat, consuming love

subtitles.original: 負けるなんてごめんだ 味がしないな
subtitles.english: I refuse to lose, it leaves a tasteless feeling

subtitles.original: 何度でも灰になる進化 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: Evolving and turning to ashes time and again, the personification of a reborn bug

subtitles.original: まだまだ腐ってあげない そう、ない 止まれない
subtitles.english: I won't let myself rot just yet, no, not yet, I can't stop

subtitles.original: 誰かじゃないあたし自身だ 生まれ変わるバグの擬人化
subtitles.english: It's not anyone else, it's me! The personification of a reborn bug

subtitles.original: まだまだ散ってあげない そう、ない
subtitles.english: I won't scatter just yet, no, not yet

subtitles.english: Fashion Beat!
